New Media and Communication

Department Chair's Message

MENU

Asst. Prof. Semra Geçkin Onat

As a field at the heart of the digital age, New Media and Communication is transforming the way individuals and institutions interact with the world. Recognising this, we have adopted an educational philosophy that aims to nurture critical, creative and dynamic individuals.

Our department provides a robust grounding in theory and practice, covering digital media, content production, social media management, interactive communication, and data literacy. Our goal is to educate our students to become leaders in the world of communication, both today and tomorrow.

Our academic staff provide guidance by combining their knowledge with professional experience. Through workshops, project-based lessons, internships and collaborations, we ensure that our students are ready for the workplace upon graduation.

As the New Media and Communication Department, our aim is to educate individuals who can interpret the changing world, use technology effectively, and embrace ethical values.

Those who wish to find out more can visit the other available web pages.
